[Button Text](https://znagathering.com/program/)

# ZaMbUTeMple

![Image 7](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/ZNA-2026-Retro-Universe-Patricia.jpg)

**![Image 8: 🛕](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f6d5.svg) A Space for Transcendence!**

Beneath the cool shade of ancient pine and cork trees, just steps away from the refreshing lake, lies the ZambuTemple— a sacred space for physical and spiritual connection.

Here is where we come together to share, reflect and transcend.

The program is divided into three powerful journeys:

# **![Image 9: 🛡️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f6e1.svg)**Goa GUardIaNs: KeEpers Of the PsychEdeliC FlaMe

![Image 10](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ZNA_banner_goaguardians_website.jpg)

The Goa Guardians are a rare breed – legendary DJs from across the global psytrance community.

They are the archivists, curators and storytellers of our scene, dedicated to collecting, cataloguing, publishing and preserving the rich heritage of Goa Trance. These true guardians keep the old-school spirit alive, ensuring that the roots of our culture continue to inspire future generations.

Some of them hold musical treasures so rare, even the original producers no longer have them – lost versions, unreleased edits and forgotten gems that echo the soul of a timeless movement.

When they play, history speaks.

# Goa gUArdiaNs Line-Up

![Image 11](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Random Records_Spain

### Dark El Kante

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A leading figure the Suomisaundi genre of psychedelic dance music, Jorge Bazan aka Dark El Kante runs the most focused label devoted to this sound, Random Records, a non-profit label that is dedicated to supporting charities that help indigenous people worldwide. The Spanish master musician has been active in the scene since the late 90s, weaving extraordinarily thoughtful sets of this elusive genre, creating atmospheres that are as deep and expansive as they are dance- and trance-inducing!

[](https://soundcloud.com/darkelkante)[](https://randomrecords.bandcamp.com/)

![Image 12](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### FR

### Doctor Vagator

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

This psychedelic ambassador has been a champion of underground Goa music since the early years at the legendary venues where this scene took root. With a massive collection on his impeccably maintained Digital Audio Tape archive, Doctor Vagator delivers full-frequency sets with a range of beloved and obscure productions. Still playing these treasures with his historical DAT players, he brings a blend of rooted power and otherworldly atmosphere to his sets.

[](https://www.facebook.com/groups/263127867458836)

![Image 13](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### DAT Universe_IL

### DJ Eden

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Captivated by the sounds of Goa music for two decades, Eden has been performing extensively as a DJ for the last ten years, playing at underground parties and festivals around the world. She has an unbridled passion for the music and a constant search to expand the sonic canvas and framework of her sets. Fusing her scientific training and artistic passionate sensibilities, she brings a vibrant, hypnotic vibe rooted in classic Goa with organic integrity, a lyrical flavour, and a strong psychedelic edge.

[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063112427546)[](https://soundcloud.com/edenbbarami)

![Image 14](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### DAT Universe_JP

### DJ Emico Amore

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Emico had her first experience with the Goa electronica movement in 1993 and has never looked back. From the dawn of the Tokyo underground scene to the beaches of Goa, she danced her way through those halcyon years as an enthusiastic participant of events while forging close relationships with many of the formative figures of the scene. While her decades-long activities as a DJ started with a focus on ambient music, her presence behind the decks has shifted focus to the dance arena, infusing her deep knowledge and love of the Goa spirit into powerful sets with a strong sense of narrative.

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/djemikoamore)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100048926726118)[](https://www.instagram.com/djemicoamore)

![Image 15](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### DAT Universe_GR

### Jordan

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

This renegade DJ from Greece has a long history in the musical underground, from the thriving hip-hop, raw rap, and acid house of the 80s into the 90s house and psychedelic dance scenes. His headfirst immersion into the London and global Goa scene found him at the helm of parties starting in 1995, within a few years playing globally in Brazil, Goa, and other international hotspots. A producer in cutting-edge projects Disco Hooligans, Outer World Elements, and TMC, he has released music on major labels and continues to push musical boundaries on dance floors around the globe, with a deep connection to the roots of the Goa movement.

[](https://soundcloud.com/dj-jordan1)

![Image 16](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Dropout Productions_CH

### Larsik

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A pioneering presence in the global scene, Larsik had his entry into DJing in the late 80s when he encountered the burgeoning electronic music scene in its formative years. With international appearances at iconic events and sites over nearly four decades, this intrepid soundsmith has an incredibly varied repertoire that extends through the entire evolution of the Goa scene through to its current vantage point. His historical insight and mastery at crafting evocative storylines create a uniquely rich atmosphere on the dance floor.

[](https://linktr.ee/djlarsik)

![Image 17](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### PsyHarmonics_PT

### Psara

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

This vivacious musician is no stranger to ZNA and fans of the scene. Psara has been a presence in the Portuguese scene for 30 years, moving from the dance floor to the decks to deliver full-powered sets across the continent and beyond. Blending her spiritual and intellectual aptitude with her first-hand experience of what works on a dance floor, Psara blends power and lyricism, intensity and sensitivity, introspection and self-expression,Equally adept at forging storylines from the greatest retro tracks of the 90s as with the latest outside-the-box productions, her presence at the Goa Guardians stage will showcase her deep love and knowledge of the foundational classics of our scene.

[](https://www.facebook.com/djpsara)[](https://soundcloud.com/djpsara)

![Image 18](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Blue Room Released_GB/US

### Simon Blue Room

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A phenomenally influential force on the psychedelic music scene in the 1990s, Simon Ghahary spearheaded countless milestone singles, compilations, and albums on the Blue Room Released label - iconic releases still idolised today. While he was usually behind the scenes conceptualising and issuing cutting-edge music with peerless presentation, he occasionally made appearances behind the decks. Now that various aspects of the legendary Blue Room brand are making a comeback, Ghahary will be making a special appearance at ZNA’s Goa Guardians stage to share some of the phenomenal music from the label’s archive - both beloved classics and unknown treasures.

[](https://www.youtube.com/@BlueRoomSounds)[](https://soundcloud.com/blueroomsound)[](https://eyeseesound.com/)

![Image 19](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### DAT Universe_BE

### Sjama'dan

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Beginning his DJ journey on vinyl soon after the dawn of the millennium, Daniel was within a year playing psytrance parties in his native Belgium. After a period of digital mixing and deepening his love for the roots of Goa Trance, he moved back to his love of vinyl as he continued to cultivate a blend of organic, hypnotic, and psychedelic atmospheres. With an emphasis on seamless blends and creative storytelling, Sjama’dan weaves his sets with infectious enthusiasm and skillful engagement.

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/danieldekeulenaer/)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100065232600877)

![Image 20](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### SE

### Ukiro

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A powerful presence in the Swedish Goa scene since its early years in the 90s, Ukiro is known by the global underground for his phenomenal record collection and encyclopaedic knowledge of the full spectrum of the genre. Introduced to Goa Trance in 1994 and starting to organise parties that same year, as a DJ he has played vinyl sets throughout Europe, the US, and Mexico. He has additionally collaborated on tracks with his longtime friend Filteria and now gives very few public performances - which makes Ukiro’s appearance at the Goa Guardians stage at ZNA a precious opportunity to hear this supremely talented musician.

[](https://www.youtube.com/@ukiro_music)

# Retro Universe

![Image 21](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/ZNA-2026-Tickets-2-Fiatlux.jpg)

This is where it all began.

It’s our vision, our language, and our identity.

The Retro Universe celebrates the golden age of Goa Psy-Trance — a time we all miss and love deeply.

These are the artists and performances that inspired us, shaped our paths, and made us choose this way of life.

Their music is more than sound — it’s memory, emotion, and pure energy.

Here, we reconnect with our roots and dance to the rhythms that started it all.

## LiNe UP

![Image 22](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Weird Music Society_AU

### Alphanaut

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Back in the 90's, there was a group of Aussie artists that fearlessly explored the realms of the psychedelic universe, fully embracing their creativity to produce exceptional music that we all love. We were certain we'd discover one of these incredible acts, a true hidden gem from our past – one that we've always adored but never had the pleasure of experiencing live before.
They are Matthew Hall and Murray Antill and they are collectively known as Alphanaut. And we believe this is the prove that incredible sounds are still out there, and that we are fully dedicated to bring these rare and extraordinary experiences to all of us.

About their performance you can expect a mind-bending journey which will make our night sessions truly unforgettable. Why you ask? Because their music can be abstract, intense, surprising, and infused with a dash of comedic delusion, all wrapped up in a high dose of psychedelia. Exactly how we like it!!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/27998-Alphanaut)[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ksrz_GVeQbw&list=RDksrz_GVeQbw&start_radio=1)

![Image 23](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Psy Harmonic_AU

### Andrew Till

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Andrew co-founded the legendary Psy-Harmonic label with Ollie Olsen (a.k.a. Shaolin Wooden Men) in the early ’90s. The label focused on the experimental, breakbeat, and twisted edges of the psychedelic Goa trance spectrum, emerging from Australia, Japan, and New Zealand. While this music was present in Goa during the ’90s, only a few in Europe had the chance to truly experience its depth and uniqueness.
Now is the time to rediscover and celebrate these outstanding psychedelic works. And there’s no better guide than Andrew Till himself. After nearly 30 years of spreading Psy-Harmonic magic, he remains one of the rare artists with the skill, knowledge, and sensitivity to deliver truly deep and unexpected musical journeys.

It’s a privilege to host Andrew once again. This time, he will take us through the magical transition from night to day, something we’re especially excited to experience, given his unmatched selection and storytelling ability.

Prepare yourselves for a full Psy-Harmonic journey, one that only Andrew can deliver.

Only one question remains, will you be there? We certainly will, and we can’t wait to share this intense moment with you all.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/104771-Andrew-Till)[](https://www.facebook.com/andrew.till)[](https://soundcloud.com/andrewtill)

![Image 24](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Spiral Trax Records_SE

### Atmos

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Tomasz is an incredible musician, an amazing human being, and someone who radiates a uniquely positive energy wherever he goes. What more could we ask for?

 Well… we can tell you exactly what we need: we need him to unleash all his skills upon us with his trademark sound, igniting the engines of our Zambu Temple Retro-Futuristic ritual.
He is, in fact, a fundamental part of the ZNA code sequence — a true family member since the very first ZNA edition back in 2013. This is why it’s impossible to imagine the next edition without his extraordinary performance.

As most of you know, his music is highly demanded and played across every corner of the world. His sets consistently become highlights of any dancefloor he steps onto. If you pay attention to the way Atmos’ music connects with the mind and body, you’ll understand why: his sets develop slowly, almost subliminally. To dive into his world, all you need to do is surrender to his flow.

A flawless sense of timing, exceptional musicality, and impeccable taste have earned him the status of absolute master. Slow, deliberate melodies creep into the smallest corners of the mind, making them glow like fluorescent art. Calling his music intelligent is an understatement — it’s enlightened. Serious groove music to soothe your heart and soul.

For this edition, we can expect a long, deep journey through the musical legacy that helped shape a new approach to Psychedelic Trance — a performance tailored exclusively for us.

 So make sure you join us on the dancefloor and experience the ZNA side of Atmos!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/22573-Atmos)[](https://www.facebook.com/atmostrance/)[](https://soundcloud.com/atmotech)

![Image 25](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Boom Records_SE

### Battle of the Future Buddhas

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Back in 2017, David played solo for our Retro Universe moment. Nine years later, we feel it’s time to welcome him back. Why? Because he’s a master of night stompers soundtracks for those wild hours when the mind is lost inside a huge, complex, psychedelic maze, guided only by the spell of a true musical wizard.
This wicked wizard, known as Battle of the Future Buddhas, is ready to unleash the funky, bombastic energy that made him one of our favorite artists ever since the release of his genius Twin Sharkfins album on the legendary Boom Records.

Prepare yourselves. David is fully committed to bring that era to us while keeping the night at ZNA raw, wild, and psychedelic. This is exactly the kind of moment we love to create—a deep flight into the powerful arms of strong, meaningful music.

We know you’re up for it.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/41480-Battle-Of-The-Future-Buddhas)[](https://www.facebook.com/battlebuddhas)[](https://soundcloud.com/battlebuddhas)

![Image 26](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Flying Rhino Rec_FR

### Blue Planet Coportation

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Gabriel Masurel, the humble mastermind behind the legendary Blue Planet Corporation, has been a pivotal figure in the development of trance music since the late 1980s. Pioneering a sound that would later become known as Goa trance, Masurel's early works in the 1990s left an indelible mark on the genre, inspiring countless artists to follow in his footsteps.
In the nascent days of trance, the lines between various subgenres were blurred, and Masurel's experimentation with psychedelic elements in hypnotic trance music proved groundbreaking. Many of his early tracks are now hard to find, attesting to their pioneering and influential nature.

Beyond his groundbreaking work in Goa trance, Gabriel Masurel is also an accomplished downtempo artist, showcasing his mastery of diverse sonic landscapes. On the dancefloor, he becomes a shaman of sorts, weaving a ritualistic tapestry of sound that fuses old-school Goa elements with progressive trance.

At ZNA Gathering, attendees can anticipate a musical journey that transcends boundaries, proving that trance music knows no limits. With Masurel's masterful curation, it's all about the perfect music at the right moment.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/4754-Blue-Planet-Corporation?noanv=1)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100046591428171)[](https://soundcloud.com/blue-planet-corporation)

![Image 27](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Transient & TIP Records_UK

### Cosmosis vs Laughing Buddha

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

There was a time in our journey when we witnessed Bilbo Bagginz and Jeremy Van Kampen working together to bring to light one of the most epic albums and tracks our scene has ever known. Back then, they were known as Cosmosis, working with Transient Records, and Laughing Buddha, working with TIP Records — creators of music filled with soul and depth. Even after all these years, we still love them with the same intensity as we did back in the day.
But perfect collaborations don’t always last. In 1997, they decided to part ways, with Cosmosis becoming Bill’s solo project and Laughing Buddha continuing under Jeremy’s direction. Whether we agreed or not, when these two top producers chose to explore different paths, we could feel it in their music. The unique chemistry they achieved together transformed into something different — still top-quality music, but distinct. And that special energy is exactly what we want to experience again. Yet, many told us that some dreams aren’t meant to be revived.

Still, we looked deep within our inner archives, searching for the right motivation — the same spirit that has guided us in creating our biennial retro-futuristic celebration. And once again, against all odds and despite the disbelief of many in the scene, we have managed to reunite these musical geniuses to reignite the depth and magic they once shared — the same magic that continues to echo in our hearts after all these decades.

At the next ZNA Edition, get ready for one of our most anticipated performances as Bill and Jeremy lead us once more into their epic Goa Trance Cosmology.

[](https://www.discogs.com/master/15057-Cosmosis-Cosmology)[](https://www.discogs.com/master/10061-Laughing-Buddha-Karma-Megamorphosis-Earth-Medicine)[](https://soundcloud.com/cosmosis-official)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/11425-Laughing-Buddha)

![Image 28](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### DR Recordings_GR

### Cyan

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Known for their groundbreaking work in the 90s, they've joined forces once again to craft a truly unique experience, one that transcends labels and showcases their unmatched production skills.
While Dj Mike Dee has been keeping the Cyan spirit alive on dancefloors, Nikos Chrisoulakis aka Nick Devon has been focusing in other musical projects. But after years apart ZNA Gathering called for a reunion of this dynamic duo in the studio. And since then, they have dedicated themselves to polishing their signature sound, ensuring it shines through our state-of-the-art sound systems. Which means we can expect a handpicked selection of their euphoric, psychedelic acid tracks, as they bring the Nitzhonot vibe to life in a whole new way.

At ZNA, we don't believe in confining music to categories. Instead, we focus on the ultimate trance experience, and Cyan's euphoric melodies and multi-layered riffs perfectly encapsulate that spirit. With a dedication to innovation, they're tailoring their sound to bringing the music they have designed during the 90´s to life like never before.

Join us as we celebrate the reunion of these high pitch melodic trance pioneers, who will lead us on an unforgettable journey through sound. At ZNA Gathering, we pride ourselves on curating unforgettable performances, and Cyan's return is a testament to our shared passion for music that knows no boundaries.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/186482-Cyan-4)[](https://www.facebook.com/Cyan.official)[](https://www.instagram.com/cyan_ofc/)

![Image 29](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Matsuri vs Aurinko_FR & UK

### Dado vs Dino Psaras

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Within the Zambu community, their names need no introduction.

 Whether as Dino Psaras, Cydonia, Deedrah vs. Synthetic, or Transwave, their past performances left powerful echoes that still resonate in our collective memory. With decades of experience and an extraordinary musical legacy behind them, every moment they take control of our ship we know we are about to witness the very best our scene has ever created.
After four editions, we felt the time had come to present something truly mind-blowing.

 So we challenged these old friends to craft an exclusive sound journey built only from the material they created throughout the 1990s — the timeless works of Frédéric Holyszewski (Deedrah, Transwave, Dado, Synthetic, Cypher, Cydonia, and more) alongside the deep archives of Dino Psaras (Tortured Brain, Ayahuasca, Phreaky, Tripster, Human Energy, and beyond).

Some of this music was released and shaped the dancefloors of an era.

 Other pieces remained hidden gems — not for lack of brilliance, but simply because time could not hold it all. Now, with our devotion to this music stronger than ever, and with thousands of studio hours behind them, we are the ones invited to rediscover and celebrate these sonic treasures.

Can you imagine the outcome of this union?

 The pinnacle of their mastery, merged into one euphoric and intense ride — a moment that will be experienced for the very first time, together with all of you.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/452270-Fr%C3%A9d%C3%A9ric-Holyszewski)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/27733-Dino-Psaras)

![Image 30](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Koyote Records_UK

### Dara Lee

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The serendipitous reconnection with Dara Lee, the mastermind behind Koyote Records, was a clear sign that sometimes, the universe brings people together when the time is right, despite our best efforts to shape destiny.
We eagerly anticipate the musical journey that he will curate for our Retro-Futuristic Celebration. For many of us, his memorable performances during the 90s evoked powerful emotions, and we cherish those sweet memories. From intense night sessions to energetic full-on Goa music, Dara's versatility is bound to satisfy everyone's taste.

We've chosen a slot for ZNA Gathering that showcases the most psychedelic and intense side of Koyote Records' legacy. We trust that Dara has the expertise and finesse to deliver a diverse yet potent set tailored to even the most seasoned dancefloor enthusiasts.

His performance will undoubtedly be a highlight of our night sessions, and we're thrilled to hear him play after all these years. It's these unique moments that make our celebration truly special and remind us why this scene holds such deep meaning for so many.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/77381-Dara-Lee)[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GeobZcYuva8&list=RDGeobZcYuva8&start_radio=1)

![Image 31](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Blue Moon Producions_HR

### DOGMA

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

After many years apart, Damir Ludvig and Goran Stetic have accepted our invitation to reunite for the sake of old times and perform at ZNA Gathering 2026. Not only have they embraced this opportunity, but they have also taken the challenge of revisiting and refining the music they crafted in the 90s, tailoring it to the state-of-the-art sound system at our Zambu Temple. We could even bet that they will unleash some unknown material for our delight.
True or not, with this incredible performance, we ensure that fresh yet classic sounds will be enjoyed by all who join us on the most remarkable dance floor we've ever experienced. A 2-hour epic journey through the best melodic Goa trance tracks from the Croatian deck masters known as Dogma during our late morning sessions. What more could you ask for?

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/228107-Dogma-4)[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G_hdbVqSYA4&list=RDG_hdbVqSYA4&start_radio=1&t=3374s)

![Image 32](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Equinox/Matsuri Productions_UK/JP

### DOMINO vs Ree-K

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Some moments feel written in the stars long before they actually happen. Moments that quietly wait through the years until the right place, the right time, and the right family come together to witness them.
Today we share one of those moments.

Both of our next artists carry stories that reach back to the very roots of the psychedelic movement. Two women who grew up inside the culture, who lived its golden years from the inside and helped shape the sound, the dance floors, and the spirit that still moves us today.

One of them was there from the very beginning for the Zambu people. An old friend, family in the truest sense of the word. A natural behind the mixer, whose energy and presence have been inspiring dancers since the early days of the scene. For many of us, she was among the first sparks that ignited a lifelong journey through trance.

The other travelled the world spreading the psychedelic message since the early 90s, carrying the spirit of her homeland and the discipline of the ancestral samurai into her powerful musical storytelling. A true pioneer whose intense and unforgettable sets have marked dance floors across the globe.

Both of them are living legends.

 Both of them helped define an era.

And somehow… despite all these years, they have never performed together.

Until now.

For the very first time ever, these two iconic artists will join forces behind the decks for a VS DJ Set, blending their histories, their sounds, and their unique energies into one shared journey on the ZNA dance floor.

Two pioneers.

 Two paths through the psychedelic universe.

 One dance floor.

What will happen when these forces finally collide?

We honestly have no idea…

 But we do know one thing: moments like this don’t come around often.

And there is no better place in the world for it to happen than surrounded by our family.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/215255-Domino-6)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/45548-ReeK)

![Image 33](blob:http://localhost/7905437b8fc7b06ff13094fd090b6e29)

##### Twisted Records_UK

### DOOF

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Hosting Nick Barber at our Retrp-Futuristic Celabration has been one of our most cherished achievements, and we couldn't be prouder to have him join us once more with us.
Nick's unforgettable performance at Boom Festival 2000 and ZNA Gathering 2024 holds a special place in our hearts and has become an integral part of ZNA history. And we can't wait to relive the magic of that moment with all of you.

To make this experience even more unique, we challenged Nick to work with our in-house audio engineers to adapt his authentic 90's music for today's state-of-the-art sound systems without compromising its essence. How exciting is this?

Now you know. You just need to get ready for another exclusive 2-hour DOOF producer set during our psychedelic afternoon sessions, featuring an enthralling blend of Nick's renowned and rare acid melodic Goa trance tracks that we all love.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/11431-Doof)[](https://soundcloud.com/nickdoof)[](https://www.facebook.com/nick.barber.12532)

![Image 34](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### High Society_SE

### Drop & Dash vs Germinator

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

What an unforgettable performance Frederik delivered at our previous edition. After so many years without being guided by his incredible music, experiencing his set again reminded us of something essential: once you feel Dash’s energy, it’s impossible to let it go.
But two legends are better than one. This time, Jan Richter—also known as Drop—accepted the challenge. Together, we all agreed that this moment had to be conducted by the two original members of Drop & Dash. True pioneers of the psytrance scene, they helped shape the genre from its earliest days.

Together, they were also part of the legendary Germinator project, alongside Steve Psycho from Psycho Disko. Now, their music is ready to be unleashed at our next Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

Expect a journey through time, resurrecting the intense, raw psychedelic sound that defined the early ’90s—Drop & Dash, Germinator, and beyond. Between the two of them lies a vast archive of unreleased and unearthed material, music that many of us will be blessed to experience for the first time in over 20 years. And according to Dash himself: if you enjoyed his previous set, you’re going to go absolutely bananas with what they’re about to unleash next.

Get ready to experience the roots of psytrance as these “young” psychedelic wizards bring their unmistakable sound back to our sacred dancefloor.

Don’t miss the chance to witness true legends in action at the next Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/41763-Drop-Dash)[](https://soundcloud.com/user9929257)

![Image 35](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Planet Dog Records_UK

### Eat Static

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Merv experiences music as an instrument that allows the listener to explore unknown feelings within the subconscious universe — the essence of a true psychedelic journey. To embark on such depth, we must forget preconceptions, formulas, and genres, and allow this magical force to guide us through uncharted sonic landscapes.
Driven by a mysterious connection to cosmic energies, Merv has devoted his artistic life to creating visionary sci-fi soundscapes, offering an honest and respectful expression of the beliefs we share.

Producing music since the early ’80s as a member of the legendary underground progressive rock band Ozric Tentacles, Merv founded Eat Static in 1989, giving full flight to his boundless imagination and creative synapses. For more than 37 years, he has explored inner realms of reality, crafting some of the most distinctive psychedelic journeys ever experienced.

For ZNA Gathering, Merv has accepted a very special challenge: diving into his personal musical archives to create a tailored live performance exclusively for our dancefloor. Expect a true encounter of “Merv vs. the Machines”, infused with timeless old-school psychedelic gems.

This is a performance that can only be experienced at our biennial retro-futuristic Gathering, a once-in-a-lifetime moment where musical boundaries dissolve in service of a pure retro psychedelic voyage.

So wherever you are when Merv steps onto the ZNA stage, make sure you don’t miss it. Set aside all expectations, open your mind and spirit, and let Eat Static guide the journey through his unique Planet Dog universe.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/4759-Eat-Static)[](https://www.facebook.com/eatstatic/)[](https://soundcloud.com/eat-static)

![Image 36](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Koyote Rec_UK

### Encens vs Ominus

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Recognizing the opportunity at hand, we knew that a performance featuring Dara Lee and musical brother Marcello Bonifacii would be a magical experience for our ZambuTemple. We set out to create the perfect environment to reunite these two legends on stage after decades apart, reviving their unforgettable music as Encens and Ominus during one of our late-morning Goa trance sessions!
Allow us to confess – this collaboration is already a must-see highlight of our next edition. The duo's incredible talent has provided us with countless euphoric dancefloor moments that have become etched in our hearts since the 90s.

Witnessing Dara and Marcello reunite on stage after 29 years is nothing short of extraordinary and a testament to the uniqueness of our celebration. We are truly grateful for this rare opportunity to witness their talent once again, and eagerly await the magical experience that their performance will bring.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/12449-Encens)[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yvxuXoWSeQw&list=RDyvxuXoWSeQw&start_radio=1)

![Image 37](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Velvet Rec_FR

### Gangguru vs COP

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The idea of merging these two soundscapes emerged from a creative exchange between our team and Phill himself. We believe he holds the perfect ingredients and vision to guide the party through a powerful transition, leading the dancefloor into a heavier, dirtier, more industrial dimension. A sonic territory we deeply cherish, masterfully explored during the 90s by pioneers of the German psychedelic scene.
As part of Children of the Paradise (C.O.P.), Phill, together with his Gangguru studio collaborators and Jan Müller, crafted one of the most iconic albums in psychedelic trance history. Released in the late 90s, Urban Alien quickly became a cult classic, seamlessly blending the defining elements of Goa psychedelic trance with the intensity and refined darkness of the emerging psychedelic techno movement. The result stands as one of the most striking musical statements of that era.

Through the Gangguru project, Phill Wess and his studio partners produced a wealth of tracks that remained hidden in archives for decades, cementing their status as some of the most mysterious and underrated underground producers of their time. Then, two decades later, DAT Universe unearthed these lost gems, bringing them back into the light and sharing them with the global psytrance community. The discovery came as a revelation, as very few knew such a rich body of work had been waiting to be heard. Some of you may have already experienced these sounds on the dancefloor, but for many, this will be a first encounter. And we truly can’t wait.

But above everything, we are confident that Phill’s performance at the next ZNA edition will leave a lasting mark on our hearts.

See you on the dancefloor.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/472253-Phil-Weiss)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100086013775830)

![Image 38](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Hadshot Haheizar_NL

### Growling Mad Scientists

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The scene today knows G.M.S. for their signature sound, which has shaped psychedelic trance since they earned their rightful recognition. From the early days as passionate “mad scientists” in the studio to becoming class-A artists sought after worldwide, their journey is part of our collective history. There was even a time when having unreleased G.M.S. tracks was the ultimate currency for any psychedelic traveler.
Throughout our exploration of the scene’s roots, we’ve brought back powerful chapters of their story from Systumbusters vs G.M.S. to the late-morning energy of G.M.S. vs Zorba. Each of these moments became unforgettable highlights on what we proudly call the best dancefloor in the world.

But this time, it goes even deeper.

This one is dedicated to the hardcore psychedelic hippies, the dancers who are no strangers to intense, lysergic environments. Riktam will dive into the music created in the ’90s alongside his dear studio partner Bansi (RIP), together with collaborators such as Sebastian Claro from Frequency Surfer, Jacob Biton from Spiral Active Project, and Amrit (RIP) as The Growly Family.

This is a journey back to the chaotic laboratory era, a time driven purely by experimentation, when the only goal was to inject new flavors into a scene hungry for innovation.

As you can imagine, this version of Growling Mad Scientists could likely only happen at our Retro-Futuristic Celebration. In today’s mainstream psychedelic dancefloors, few would dare to present this raw and uncompromising chapter.

But we know better.

Within our reality, our setting, and among our devoted community, this may well become the most desired Growling Mad Scientists performance ever delivered.

An intense psychedelic voyage, guided by the original creator, aligned with the nocturnal soundscapes that our biennial ritual demands.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/43290-GMS)[](https://www.gms-music.com/)[](https://www.instagram.com/this_is_gms_official/)

![Image 39](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### TIP World Rec_UK

### The Infinity Project VS Excess Head

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The Infinity Project needs no introduction. It is the project that gave birth to the mythical label TIP – The Infinity Project World Records back in 1994. Its roots go back to the late ’80s, when Raja Ram and Graham Wood joined forces to create music for acid heads hungry for new, underground, futuristic psychedelic sounds—something that was truly rare at the time.
Alongside close friends such as Martin Freeland (Man With No Name), Simon Posford (Hallucinogen), and Nick Barber (Doof), they shaped nearly a decade of flawless releases under the name The Infinity Project, helping to define what Goa trance would become.

In 1998, Raja Ram and Graham Wood decided to part ways in order to focus on other creative paths. From time to time, both continued to perform as The Infinity Project, each following their own vision within the TIP universe. Over the years, these two interpretations evolved in very different directions, becoming distinct expressions of the same original spirit.

Excess Head is Graham Wood’s solo project. Under this alias, he expanded his creativity even further, crafting a vast body of incredible music that, until now, has largely remained hidden. Knowing what he achieved as The Infinity Project, one can only imagine the potential of the material he has been keeping under his belt all these years. One thing is certain: this music is fully dancefloor-ready, made to feed the minds of true Goa trance rockers and to push the boundaries of reality and musical perception.

For our next edition, we’ve chosen to experience the very best of Graham Wood through both of these aliases. This means two distinct yet complementary journeys: the nostalgia of timeless music we know and love, and the excitement of discovering unreleased sounds created in the very era that shaped us.

From where we stand, it doesn’t get better than this.

 We can’t wait to start Feeling Weird with all of you.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/4512-The-Infinity-Project%20Discogs)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/28000-Excess-Head%20Facebook)[](https://www.facebook.com/GrahamWoodExcessheadTip)

![Image 40](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Cross Records_FR

### Jaïa

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

We first met Yannis in 1997, when he performed at the legendary Herdade do Zambujal during the very first edition of Boom Festival. It was love at first sight. We immediately recognized his unique artistic vision — a quality that made him stand out then, and still makes him stand out today.
Since that moment, we’ve been following his musical explorations, and every time we hear his work, we can feel the dedication and attention to detail. Gifted with an incredible ability to blend genres, his art places him among the greatest musicians of our time.

It’s well known that his music carries deep emotional charge; dancing to it is always a unique experience — a form of psychedelia that lifts you into a state of harmony and connection with everything around you.

And although Yannis has already performed as Jaïa for the Zambu Community, he always manages to deliver a completely different musical experience each time. This edition will be no exception.

For our next gathering, Jaïa will be the artist welcoming us onto the dancefloor for the beginning of another Retro Universe journey, crafting a perfectly tuned build-up set for the smooth genre transitions that are so essential to the musical storytelling we believe defines ZNA and keeps it true to its roots. The set will be prepared exclusively for us, and knowing him as we do… there will be no limits, no rules — only blissful MUSIC.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/15586-Ja%C3%AFa)[](https://soundcloud.com/jaia)[](https://www.facebook.com/jaiamusic)

![Image 41](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Vinyl Set Psychic Deli Records_DE & UK

### Jean Borelli vs Sid Shanti

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Last edition, welcoming Sid Shanti back to the ZNA dancefloor was one of those rare moments that reminded us why we do what we do. An artist whose musical intuition, taste, and presence helped define an era, both as a DJ and as a producer, and whose influence still resonates deeply within our collective memory.
For the next edition, Sid Shanti returns once again. But this time, he does not come alone.

In an exclusive performance for ZNA Gathering, Sid Shanti will share the decks with Jean Borelli, also known as Orion, another key figure from the formative years of our scene. Together, they represent a lineage of sound that helped shape psychedelic trance into what it became: refined, emotional, and uncompromising.

This will be a special vinyl set, crafted exclusively for ZNA. A dialogue between two musical minds who lived, breathed, and helped define the golden era of psychedelic trance. Expect a carefully curated journey through timeless records, deep grooves, and the unmistakable warmth that only vinyl can deliver, guided by experience, intuition, and pure musical wisdom.

This is not just a performance.

 It is a meeting of histories.

 A shared ritual.

 A gift to the worldwide collective known as the Zambu warriors.

Another unique moment awaits you at your ZNA Gathering.

[](https://www.discogs.com/master/1130433-Jean-Borelli-Deck-Wizards-Planet-Maya)[](https://www.discogs.com/release/335480-Sid-Shanti-Deck-Wizards-Aural-Sect)

![Image 42](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Stoneage Records_SE

### Jonas

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Back in the days when Goa trance was reaching its peak, a handful of artists were already venturing into the stranger corners of our psychedelic universe. Some of them wandered so deeply into these unexplored realms that they emerged with some of the most psychedelic music ever created at the time.
These forest creatures mastered the art of crafting extraordinary soundscapes that soon became highly sought after by the most dedicated and adventurous dancefloors in our culture.

Every edition, we invite an artist who, from our perspective, embodies the essence of this era and musical language. This time, we are proud to welcome DJ Jonas, also known as one of the co-founders of Trashlords, as the ambassador of this unique sonic world.

With more than three decades of experience behind the decks, we know we will be in very good hands.

For our Retro-Futuristic Celebration, Jonas has been challenged to unleash the very essence of the music that defined this movement. We know he possesses one of the finest and most complete collections of this sound, alongside his own productions, making him one of the most qualified artists imaginable for this mission.

We loved what Ulf, as Little Blue Men, delivered at the last edition, and we can only imagine what Jonas is capable of bringing to the dancefloor.

That is why we are genuinely excited to experience the "Tale" he is preparing for all of us.

We have a feeling it is going to be psychedelic as fuck. And we absolutely love it.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/396445-DJ-Jonas)[](https://soundcloud.com/user-691313601)

![Image 43](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Perfecto Records_UK

### Man With No Name

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

An artist who possesses the rare ability to unleash the euphoria, unity, and happiness we are all so deeply addicted to. One whose music creates unique moments, unique energies, and unforgettable smiles that stay with us forever.
Man With No Name is undoubtedly one of those treasures in the ZNA vault.

Every one of his performances at ZNA Gathering has elevated the dancefloor beyond itself, proving time and again that we are all connected by the same invisible force. That special energy we all long to experience again. An energy that may seem lost in today's world, yet never forgotten. At ZNA, we have been fortunate enough to reconnect with it, free from boundaries and expectations.

The Man himself has often told us how deeply he feels the connection with the ZNA dancefloor and how our gathering ranks among the most remarkable experiences of his long and celebrated devotion to our scene. The feeling is mutual.

The echoes of his previous performances are still alive within the ZambuTemple, and we knew we had to invite him back once more. His music, his energy, and his unmistakable talent deserve to be shared again with all of us.

So make sure you don't miss one of the most epic two-hour journeys ZNA has to offer, a performance crafted especially for our Retro-Futuristic Celebration. Expect timeless classics, rare gems from his private archives, and those unforgettable moments that only emerge when artist and dancefloor become one.

Prepare yourself for one of the most euphoric and uplifting experiences our gathering has ever witnessed.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/5342-Man-With-No-Name)[](https://soundcloud.com/manwithnonameofficial)[](http://www.manwithnoname.co.uk/)

##### Atomic Records_UK

### Mark Van Der Vlugt

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Mark work pushed expectations and redefined just how far and how deep psychedelic sound could take us. He is undeniably responsible for many of our wildest and most unforgettable moments on the dance floor. And as you know, this is exactly what drives us. Bringing those nostalgic experiences back to life is what makes the ZNA Gathering so unique and meaningful.
That’s why it is a true honour to welcome Marc Van Der Vlugt to the lineup of our next edition.

This time, he will guide us through one of the most mystical moments of the dancefloor experience: the transition from night into day. He embraced this challenge with enthusiasm, knowing that this precise time and place would be perfect to unleash the full extent of his mastery.

We know for a fact that Marc is already preparing a very special journey—drawing from his rare and priceless psychedelic trance collection, carefully preserved since the glory days. From our conversations, we dare say that we may even hear tracks, or unique versions of tracks, that most of us have never experienced before—music once created exclusively for artists like him, long before labels and distributors shaped the industry.

One thing is certain: this will be a genuine monster performance, destined to catch many of us by surprise.

We hope this makes it clear how deeply our celebrations are shaped by the deck wizards we choose to guide our dance.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/74281-Marc-van-der-Vlugt)

##### Chaos Unlimited_UK

### Mark Allen

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Has been shaping our scene since the early 90s. Widely known for taking dancefloors to higher states of psychedelia by blending styles and breaking formulas, he became a genius to many—and an eccentric to others. Looking back, it’s clear he was a true visionary: an artist who refused to be confined by rules, always showing us just how beautifully unexpected a psytrance journey can be.

 Every time we’ve witnessed Mark behind the decks, his depth of experience has become a tool for expanding minds and elevating souls.
At the next ZNA Gathering, expect his vast musical awareness to guide us through epic, timeless adventures—journeys where the only requirement is to let go and surrender to the moment. And we know you expect nothing less.

Because this is how a real psytrance journey should be crafted: without boundaries, without expectations, and entirely shaped by the shared experience that unites us on the dancefloor.

One thing is undeniable: he is one of the greatest pioneers of psytrance. And we are truly honored to welcome him back.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/74240-Mark-Allen)

![Image 46](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### PsyHarmonics rec_JP & AU

### MasaRay

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

These artists truly embody the essence of our concept and mission.

 Ray, who is certainly no stranger to our community, was there at the very birth of this scene. Alongside true Goa legends like Laurent and Fred Disko, he experienced the earliest gatherings where freedom, peace, and music shaped an entirely new way of living. These were times before electronic music dominated dancefloors, when what truly mattered was the celebration of happiness, unity, and consciousness through sound. A spirit that would go on to inspire generations across the world.
Masa also left a deep mark on our hearts, especially during his unforgettable performances at ZNA 2017 and 2019. A highly skilled artist, he has been producing and playing electronic music since the early 90s, and his energy on stage perfectly represents the kind of magical moments we seek to create at ZNA.

Together, they will draw from decades of musical exploration to deliver a celestial and fully original 3-hour morning session, a journey designed to elevate all of us into a higher state of joyful consciousness.

These masters approach music in a truly unique way, very different from what most are used to. So, if you are a true Goa Trance aficionado, we strongly recommend being right in the action zone while they perform. It promises to be an epic moment, one that will reward every dancer with a rare and magical feeling.

Masaray will perform for the sake of the experience, and for the sake of the dancers.

Forgotten feelings will become available to us again during this ultimate trance experience.

Will you be part of it?

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/26559-Masaray?srsltid=AfmBOorOGzozNGvV3KevuXvIU3dprA8_QBwxjZlPRwHfeS9J6hP97fhE)

##### Global Trance Network_DE

### Mittelstandskinder Ohne Strom

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Renowned for their exceptional studio engineering prowess and a remarkable body of work, this duo (in spite of being "middle class children without electricity") are set to deliver an unforgettable experience that you won't want to miss. Their unwavering commitment to perfection has led them to begin crafting a monster musical journey exclusively for the Zambu community, in recognition of the immense honor and responsibility of performing for us all.
This extraordinary retrospective journey will guide us through the captivating worlds of Mittelsandskinder Ohne Strom, Nerve and N.D.M.A.

 Expect them to start with their signature groove and intense reality, ultimately leading us to their powerful, euphoric old-school Goa Trance tracks created during the 90's.

If this announcement doesn't send shivers of excitement through you, fear not—for after immersing yourself in their Lunar Church session, you'll undoubtedly discover The Answer and become a convert. Are you ready to embrace this?

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/34508-Mittelstandskinder-Ohne-Strom)[](https://soundcloud.com/mittelstandskinderohnestrom)[](https://www.instagram.com/mittelstandskinder_ohne_strom/)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063548708457)
