##### Perfecto Records_IL

### Mystica vs One Man Game

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Avi Pe'er, Charlie Ben-Moha and Yossef Master, many of you know them from their legendary project One Man Game or from Mystica, which we feel became the natural evolution of their original vision. After 30 years without sharing a stage together, Avi Pe'er and Yossef Master will finally reunite for a very special first-time performance at the ZambuTemple, and we are truly excited to experience this moment with all of you.
Their music carries exactly the kind of energy we love to explore during our afternoon sessions: rolling basslines, uplifting melodies, and all the beautiful elements that define the brighter side of psychedelic trance. This is the sound that welcomes us as we approach the final stages of an intense musical journey, one that moves through different moods, textures, emotions, and sonic languages as we lose ourselves within the ZambuTemple experience.

It is often within these soundscapes that we reconnect with our deepest and most beautiful emotions. Moments that remind us why we gather, why we dance together, and why we love sharing ZNA so much.

Expect a session filled with timeless music, emotion, and excitement. We already know this will become another truly special moment in our shared history, and we cannot wait to experience it together with all of you.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/185103-One-Man-Game)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/5567-Mystica)

![Image 49](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Spirit Zone Records_DE

### Ololiuqui

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

There are certain time slots that are incredibly difficult to fill, especially when the ultimate goal is to create a meaningful psychedelic journey where each performance connects naturally and respectfully with the next. We become truly excited whenever we discover artists who, against all odds, reveal themselves to be the perfect missing piece of a puzzle that initially seemed impossible to solve.
This particular challenge was to find an artist capable of guiding the dancefloor from a progressive environment into the psychedelic rawness the Aussie sound became famous for. Finding an eclectic DJ able to achieve such a transition without sounding forced would already be difficult enough. But discovering a producer who not only carries such a broad musical universe within his repertoire, but who can also create the smoothest transition we could possibly hope for… honestly, we did not believe it would happen.

But then it did.

And the deeper we explored his musical journey, the more excited we became.

The artist behind the legendary Ololiuqui project is, incredibly, exactly what this moment calls for: a sonic ride that will guide us from groovier and fuller rhythms into the untamed psychedelic rawness that labels such as Psy-Harmonics helped define.

This will be Volker König’s Retro-Futuristic premiere, and we genuinely feel that his entire musical evolution has been leading toward this very moment.

We will be in the front row to experience this journey. Will you join us?

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/4770-Ololiuqui?srsltid=AfmBOooUObAG5Ox0IOnd93jIzAiiXEY08PBqIEFtqPQO6WHSZpqwOrVB)[](https://www.facebook.com/ololiuqui1)[](https://soundcloud.com/ololiuqui-original)

![Image 50](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Flying Rhino_UK

### Process

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

We're ecstatic to announce the return of a true trance pioneer, Sean Williams, the creative force behind the renowned aliases Process and Satori, will be gracing our stage at ZNA Gathering! Since the early days of the psychedelic trance movement, Sean has made an indelible impact on the genre, shaping its evolution with his innovative soundscapes.
After his unforgettable performance with Drezz Nervasystem and Aether at our past edition, we've invited him back for a very special slot that demands both immense talent and musical finesse. As the night intensifies, Sean will guide us on a journey through his boundary-pushing One Drop or Two album or Superior Technology era to his classic older masterpieces he wrote as Satori, together with Pete Martin or by himself as Process while sharing the studio with producers like James Monro, Simon Posford, Tristan or Tsuyoshi Suzuki.

Hosting Sean Williams is an immense honor, and we can't wait to share his incredible music with each of you. Prepare for a truly unforgettable experience as we celebrate the lasting legacy of this psychedelic trance genius!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/27938-Process-2)[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bTkD1hZlMko)

![Image 51](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Twisted Records_UK

### Prometheus

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Some artists don’t follow trends. They build worlds. In July 2026, ZNA Gathering opens a rare portal for one of the true architects of psychedelic sound design: Benji Vaughan aka Prometheus.
A name inseparable from Twisted Records’ deeper legacy, Prometheus has always moved quietly, deliberately, and far from the noise. His music isn’t rushed into existence; it is engineered, refined, and released only when it carries meaning. This approach, equal parts discipline and devotion, is the reason his appearances are scarce, and his sets unforgettable.

For decades, Benji has navigated two demanding universes: one rooted in sonic exploration, the other in a successful entrepreneurial life based in the UK. This balance has made each performance a conscious choice rather than a routine stop, and that is exactly what makes this moment, once again, so special.

At ZNA 2026, Prometheus will step into the temple for a bespoke Twisted Producer Set, curated exclusively for the Gathering. No shortcuts. No repetition. Just a deep, patient unfolding of psychedelic storytelling,from crystalline precision to raw, unfiltered experimentation.

Many also know him as one half of Younger Brother, alongside Simon Posford, a project that reshaped how emotion, rhythm, and psychedelia could coexist. That same depth, curiosity, and unpredictability will guide this journey.

This is not a headline act. It’s a communion.

We look forward to sharing this chapter with you.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/19870-Prometheus)[](https://www.facebook.com/prometheus.music.page)

![Image 52](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Atomic Records_UK

### Psychaos

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

When night falls, a different kind of energy awakens.
Joti Sidhu invites you into a producer set crafted for the deeper hours, where sound becomes pressure, and pressure becomes movement.

This is the sound of a pioneer whose roots trace back to the groundbreaking Blue Room and Atomic Records era, a time when the foundations of psychedelic trance were being written in real time. A legacy that still echoes, still evolves, and still pushes forward.

Expect a journey driven by power and precision. An intense, industrial edge colliding with intricate layers and unexpected melodies, a constant tension between intensity and beauty, chaos and control.

Each moment carefully constructed. Each transition intentional. Each frequency designed to pull you further in.

This is not just music this is a statement of the roots of our scene. A deep dive into the architecture of Psychaos.

A full-force experience for those who seeks to experience the chaotic psychedelic ride.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/4515-Psychaos)[](https://www.facebook.com/PsychaosRecordings/)

![Image 53](blob:http://localhost/47e4b9659c702a727709d7d200479528)

##### Psy Harmonics Records_FR

### Psyko Disko vs Spies

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Fred Disko impact commands our utmost respect, as he not only bore witness to the movement's inception but played an instrumental role in shaping its evolution from the psychedelic rock Goa parties of the 60's and 70's to the rise of Goa trance parties in the late 80's and early 90's.
In an extraordinary collaboration, the legendary, nearly 80 years old, will grace the Zambu Temple stage for a once-in-a-lifetime performance at the invitation of our dear and music alchemist Holeg Spies.

 This unique event stands as a testament to the boundless energy and devotion that permeates our psychedelic universe, uniting the founding fathers of our scene with our passionate and respectful community.

Summing up, you just need to prepare yourself for a transcendent, 3-hour musical odyssey to the heart of our scene, as Psyko Disko and Holeg (as Spies) showcase the enduring intensity and psychedelic essence of their music. This promises to be another treasured moment for us all to share at our beloved Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/471317-Fred-Disko)[](https://soundcloud.com/spiestv)[](https://www.youtube.com/user/freddisko1)[](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100015334142838)

![Image 54](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Iboga Rec_DK

### Reefer Decree

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A defining force of the Scandinavian psychedelic movement, Reefer Decree carved a unique path through the golden years of Goa trance, blending hypnotic grooves, progressive storytelling, and a deeply atmospheric touch that still resonates today. Their sound sits at the perfect intersection between drive and emotion, timeless, intelligent, and unmistakably their own.
Back in the day, Daniel Jiwook and Oliver Bierlich chose a different direction. Instead of layering melodies endlessly, they focused on the raw power of groove and basslines, crafting a stripped yet deeply effective form of psychedelia that speaks directly to the dancefloor.

For us, this sound represents the perfect language to open a 24-hour psychedelic journey, where each moment calls for a different expression, a different energy, a different story. And Oliver is the perfect guide to set that tone, conducting the opening chapter of what will become one of the most memorable sessions we’ve prepared for you.

For many, these sounds belong to a distant past. For us, they are living, breathing expressions of a culture we continue to celebrate and share. And there is no better place than ZNA Land to experience them as they were meant to be, on a proper sound system, surrounded by a community that truly understands.

Prepare yourselves.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/27650-Reefer-Decree)[](https://soundcloud.com/reefer-decree)[](https://www.facebook.com/reeferdecree)

![Image 55](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### MoonSpirit Records_FR

### Silicon Sound

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Nothing compares to the sensation of soft melodies and rolling basslines as the sun prepares to set after hours of pure madness and euphoric energy. At that moment, both body and mind reach the perfect state for simplicity—music that nourishes the soul and offers the ideal closure to an intense psychedelic journey. With this kind of sound, gentle emotions surround you, and suddenly you realize that the energy still flows effortlessly within.

 There aren't many artists capable of delivering this feeling... but we have one.
An artist we have always admired, and whom we deeply missed since he chose to step back from live performances. His name is Johannes Regnier, known on the dancefloor as Silicon Sound—a remarkably talented producer who, back in the day, forged a unique psychedelic signature. Anyone who has ever been exposed to his music knows exactly what we mean.

After years away, we invited him to return and craft, using his own legacy, a perfect closure. This moment will mark the end of a 24-hour marathon of old-school psychedelic rhythms, acid layers, and emotional melodies. These slots are reserved for artists who have mastered the formula—those who understand precisely what is needed when music itself has taken full command of the dancefloor.

Top-quality music, crafted for the dancefloor, will once again be experienced... by all of us.

We cannot wait to share this closing moment with you. It's going to be EPIC.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/57781-Silicon-Sound)[](https://siliconsound.bandcamp.com/)[](https://johannesregnier.com/)

![Image 56](blob:http://localhost/7905437b8fc7b06ff13094fd090b6e29)

##### DAT Universe_CA

### Solitare

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

One of the few living psytrance walking libraries, he carries within him an extraordinary musical archive, a true Goa Guardian of our psychedelic trance legacy.
Decades of dedication, relentless digging, and refined mastery, combined with a unique personality, have made him one of the keepers of some of the rarest Goa trance gems out there.

Together with fellow music explorers, Mark Ainley a.k.a. DJ Solitare has spent years uncovering, preserving, and curating thousands of tracks including pieces many original producers believed were lost forever, drifting somewhere in the wormholes of time.

Luckily for us, we will once again have the chance to dance to his unique and rare old-school Goa trance selections during our ZNA morning sessions.

A moment that will surely resonate with Goa trance purists and with all those who seek meaningful, story-driven journeys on the dancefloor.

A moment not to be missed at the next ZNA celebration.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/3662990-DJ-Solitare)[](https://www.facebook.com/DJSolitare23)[](https://www.instagram.com/djsolitare/)

![Image 57](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Yoyo Rec & 3DVision Rec_Il & FR

### Space Cat vs Talamasca

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Avi Algranati e Cedric Dassulle aka Lestat will take us on an exhilarating ride, starting with their iconic Goa Trance classics and seamlessly transitioning to the music they've created together and individually during the early millennium. This Mexican standoff between Yoyo Records, Vision Quest, 3Division, and Spiral Trax Universe will undoubtedly send euphoric shockwaves across our dancefloor, just the way we like it!
Both Avi and Lestat have been trailblazing the global Psytrance scene since the mid-nineties, garnering respect for their ability to read and ignite dancefloors worldwide. What they've got in store for the upcoming ZNA edition, however, promises to be a never-before-seen experience that'll keep you on your toes!

In anticipation of this monumental performance, we're granting Space Cat and Talamasca a well-deserved 3-hour slot during peak hours. We simply can't contain our excitement and pride in making this happen, and we can't wait to share this extraordinary experience with all of you.

Get ready to embark on a mind-bending sonic adventure with Space Cat and Talamasca at ZNA Gathering!

[](https://soundcloud.com/spacecat1official)[](https://www.facebook.com/Spacecatpage)[](https://soundcloud.com/talamasca)[](https://www.facebook.com/talamasca.official)

![Image 58](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Nova Tekk Media_DE

### Spiralkinder

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

A project conceived deep in the 90s within the German scene, where visionary minds like X-Dream, Spirallianz, Noosphere, Morphem and Planet Ben were already shaping a new frontier. A darker, more industrial dimension, where raw textures and hypnotic pressure merged seamlessly with the spirit of Goa trance.
A sound that felt different. Edgier. Dirtier. More intense… and yet, deeply psychedelic.

From this fertile ground emerged a rare and powerful creation known as Spiralkinder.

Two friends, united by a shared passion for sonic exploration, crafting music that would echo through the underground with force and mystery. While Arne became widely known through projects like Midimiliz, Spirallianz, and later Extrawelt, Marco was the missing link that brought Spiralkinder into existence. Together, they created something elusive… something secret… a true hidden weapon.

Back then, the scene wasn’t driven by labels, it was driven by moments. Spiralkinder was exactly that. Music born from shared studio sessions, from creative collisions between minds. Many of their tracks emerged through collaborations with artists like Marcus Maichel & Jan Müller, Ben Wierzoch, Morphem and others.

That’s why so few ever witnessed Spiralkinder live. It was never about bookings, it was about creation, experimentation, and the exchange of knowledge.

But ZNA Gathering has become a force capable of reigniting these rare moments. Because here, there is purpose. A shared intention to revive the sounds that pushed boundaries back in the 90s.

The tracks they left behind, scarce, refined, and uncompromising, became treasures hunted by those who knew. Music passed hand to hand between DJs, reserved for the moments when the dancefloor is ready to dive deeper… into heavier territories.

So once again… we went for one of the rare ones.

What awaits is not just a set, but a dense, industrial, layered journey. A raw and powerful experience, crafted for those who seek intensity, depth, and meaning on the dancefloor.

This might be a once-in-a-lifetime moment.

 Make sure you are there to witness it.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/104511-Spiralkinda)

![Image 59](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Spirit Zone Rec_DE

### SUN Project

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The SUN Project is synonymous with an unparalleled, high-energy experience that exemplifies the essence of a true party atmosphere.

 Since 1996, their unique fusion of interactive live band vibes and hypnotic trance music has been at the forefront of the Goa/Psy Trance revolution.
Following 13 years of touring and captivating fans around the globe, the band members pursued different projects while maintaining their signature live show performance style.

At our upcoming Gathering, we are thrilled to welcome Mathias Rumoeller and Marco Minichelli as they bring the SUN Project back to life with an extraordinary Retro Live Show that promises to be a special treat for fans.

Their infectious passion for music will be on full display as they prepare a special set to "Dance with the Witches" at "The Edge of Time." But that's not all—they have a surprise in store for us that's sure to elevate this unforgettable experience to even greater heights! Can you imagine what it could be? One thing is certain: it will be a powerful moment on the best dancefloor ever!

 In an extraordinary collaboration, the legendary, nearly 80 years old, will grace the Zambu Temple stage for a once-in-a-lifetime performance at the invitation of our dear and music alchemist Holeg Spies.

 This unique event stands as a testament to the boundless energy and devotion that permeates our psychedelic universe, uniting the founding fathers of our scene with our passionate and respectful community.

Summing up, you just need to prepare yourself for a transcendent, 3-hour musical odyssey to the heart of our scene, as Psyko Disko and Holeg (as Spies) showcase the enduring intensity and psychedelic essence of their music. This promises to be another treasured moment for us all to share at our beloved Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/22666-SUN-Project?noanv=1)[](https://soundcloud.com/sun-project)[](https://www.facebook.com/sunproject.official)

![Image 60](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Matsuri Rec_JP

### Tsuyoshi Suzuki

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Through his involvement in groundbreaking projects such as Prana (formerly Taiyo), JouJouka, Return to the Source, and the iconic Matsuri Records (now reborn as Matsuri Digital), Tsuyoshi has played a defining role in shaping psychedelic trance music and culture as we know it.
Back in the day, his sets became milestones, unpredictable journeys where audiences were constantly surprised by his fearless fusion of styles and sounds. With a singular vision of guiding the dancefloor into deep, immersive psychedelic experiences, he transformed each performance into something unforgettable. This evolution only deepened when he explored other musical paths, stepping away from the psytrance scene for nearly a decade to expand his artistic expression.

For the upcoming ZNA edition, Tsuyoshi returns with a very special focus: a set dedicated entirely to the music he collected throughout the 90s, with particular emphasis on the sounds that defined the Matsuri universe.

Can you imagine the treasures he holds? We can confidently say that his archive stands among the richest and most fascinating collections of psychedelic trance music in existence. And we will have the rare privilege of dancing to these timeless gems.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/47436-Tsuyoshi-Suzuki)[](https://soundcloud.com/matsuritsuyoshi)[](https://www.facebook.com/MatsuriTsuyoshi)

![Image 61](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Matsuri Productions_JP

### Ubar Tmar

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

His music unfolds into a multifaceted spectrum of psychedelic journeys, immersing the dancefloor in a complete alternative reality.
We are beyond excited to unveil the heavyweight musical mad genius behind the Ubar Tmar project.

Takeshi Isogai, from Japan, has been creating experimental psychedelic music since the mid-nineties. Over the years, his live performances have become known as true musical labyrinths, where the dancer can never predict what will come next.

We believe that performances like this are quite rare nowadays, and that only a handful of artists are capable of delivering such an abstract and epic experience.

As an artist, this self-proclaimed “freakiest Japanese on Earth” loves to explore different genres and, through his masterful production skills, constantly redefines the boundaries of Goa and Psytrance music.

At the next ZNA Gathering, you can expect an exquisite performance from the master himself , one that will surely reshape the way many of us perceive our psychedelic musical journeys.

See you on the dancefloor.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/27791-Ubar-Tmar)[](https://soundcloud.com/ubar-tmar)[](https://www.facebook.com/ubar.uva)

![Image 62](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Dragonfly Rec_FR

### U.X. vs Syb Unity Nettwerk

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

So often, within a trance experience, we step into an entirely different reality. The music becomes a portal, a channel connecting us to infinite alternative universes.
For some, it’s the deeper, heavier atmospheres that pull us further down the rabbit hole. For others, it’s the melody that sends shivers down the spine. And when a journey is crafted with true mastery, the transition transforms us, we emerge recharged, reborn as psychedelic warriors of unconditional love.

Tonight, we are proud to announce our longtime friend and retro-futuristic ally Kris Klyven, known for his legendary projects U.X. (Ultimate Xperience) and Syb Unity Nettwerk.

At the next ZNA edition, expect him to guide us through the depths of the night and its darker shades, steadily lifting us toward light-filled, radiant moments. A deeply psychedelic and profoundly rewarding voyage awaits.

Do not miss this tailor-made performance, created exclusively for our 2026 Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/65078-Kris-Kylven)[](https://soundcloud.com/kris-kylven-productions)[](https://www.facebook.com/kkylven)

![Image 63](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Shiva Space Technology_IL

### Yahel

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

After nearly 24 hours of non-stop psychedelic music—flowing from fat grooves with subtle melodies, to full-power psychedelia, to abstract mental journeys, and endless layers of acid—there’s simply no better way to close such a marathon than with emotional, melodic Goa trance. And if there’s someone who truly knows how to channel those emotions, it’s Yahel.
Back in the 90s, Yahel crafted timeless tracks that defined euphoric, emotional Goa trance. More than two decades later, these milestones still carry the same impact when played under the right conditions—something we always aim to create during our Retro-Futuristic Celebration.

In a previous edition, Yahel reminded us all of music’s power to transcend. The dancefloor became a single organism, united in feeling, and we still remember how magical it was.

We can’t wait to discover what he will prepare for us this time—especially now that he has experienced firsthand what ZNA truly means and what makes our dancefloor so unique.

What we do know is this: we’ll be there, ready to surrender to his old-school emotions—with all of you by our side.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/13834-Yahel)[](https://soundcloud.com/djyahel)[](https://www.facebook.com/yahelsherman)

# FUTUrisTic RealiTy

![Image 64](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/ZNA-2026-Futuristic-Reality-Fiatlux.jpg)

After a full week of retro-psychedelic immersion, you may find yourself in a unique state —**tired yet renewed**, open to a new level of awareness.

 A moment of clarity, where the focus shifts from**“me” to “we.”**

As true party animals, we’ve teamed up with our friends at**Suntrip Records**to bring you the finest in**new school Goa Psy-Trance**.

Expect powerful soundscapes, deep connection, and waves of**euphoria, unity and pure happiness**.

 This is the next step in our journey — forward-looking, high-energy and full of light.

## LiNe UP

![Image 65](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Suntrip Records_BE

### Anoebis

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Does this DJ still need an introduction? The label owner of Suntrip Records has one of the biggest Goa-trance collections, plays all over the world, and knows perfectly how to read the crowd after 25 years of DJing. At the last edition of ZNA he couldn’t be there because he was fighting leukemia. This time he is back, and he will prove that music has healing properties! Ready for melodic bliss to end the festival?

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/553109-Anoebis)[](https://soundcloud.com/anoebis)

![Image 66](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Suntrip Records_FR

### Antidot & DICA

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

The future is now! Remember when Goa-trance was fresh and influenced by other genres? French duo DICA & Antidot continue on this path. They create a perfect mix of Goa-trance, acid, hard-trance, and techno—and they do it with a full live hardware setup! Check out their vinyl EP on Suntrip if you feel teased already. We’re glad to have these guys on board for an energetic high-BPM set that is both original and fun!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/7020494-Dica-4)[](https://soundcloud.com/antidotrec)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/13512604-Antidot-5)[](https://soundcloud.com/dica-mkrksm)

![Image 67](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Global Sect / Suntrip Records_RO

### Artifact303

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Romanian Zsolt Peter became an immediate legend after his debut album on Suntrip in 2011. Ever since, people have been craving more Artifact303! Zsolt found the perfect balance between modern production and magical Goa-trance melodies. On top of that, he is a master storyteller. He will unveil another fairytale under the magic trees at ZNA!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/873456-Artifact303)[](https://soundcloud.com/artifact303)

![Image 68](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Goa Madness Records_BE

### Ephedra

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Belgian Alexander Cohen has been producing Goa-trance for 20 years now, which has slowly made him one of the most important musicians of today. His feeling for beautiful melodies, combined with euphoric harmonies and bouncy modern kicks, can only create havoc on the dancefloor! Meanwhile, he is also running Goa Madness, one of today’s leading labels.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/134263-Ephedra-2)[](https://soundcloud.com/ephedra-1)

![Image 69](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### 604 Freaks / Suntrip Records_PT

### Goaacen

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Goaacen is one of the leading Portuguese Goa-trance DJs! As a label DJ for Suntrip and also part of 604 Productions, he is a driving force within the psychedelic movement. Gaining more and more attention lately, he loves to explore slightly darker Goa territories. At ZNA he will show us that a 2-hour journey can fly by very fast ![Image 70: 🙂](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f642.svg)

[](https://soundcloud.com/tiago-lopes-646831806)

![Image 71](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Suntrip Records_ES

### Hypnoxock

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Victor is one of those creative millipedes. He created fantastic ambient and psytrance before returning to his big love once again: Goa-trance! After his latest album and vinyl EP, he has become a well-received act at many festivals, praised for his funky, unconventional psychedelic style. He can play more melodic morning vibes or more acidic material. At ZNA he will combine it all to satisfy all your needs ![Image 72: 🙂](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f642.svg)

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/60275-Hypnoxock)[](https://soundcloud.com/hypnoxock)

![Image 73](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Global Sect / Suntrip Records_FR

### Merr0w

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Merr0w is a French modern Goa-trance pioneer! Brice has been making our favourite music since the beginning of this millennium, and has already released albums on Suntrip & Global Sect. Now he is ready for the next step: playing a sunrise set on the biggest Goa-trance stage in the world. Merr0w is known for his massive, maximal, smashing style of melodic Goa-trance. Not for the faint-hearted!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/737661-Merr0w)[](https://soundcloud.com/merr0w)

![Image 74](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Suntrip Records_BE

### Mini Spacer

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

This Belgian morning-trance master has the rare ability to create something not many artists can: music that is melodic, magical, harmonic, and melancholic. It’s as if he can beam us back to the beaches of the 90s. You can experience this yourself on this golden morning if you feel like floating on magical Goa melodies!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/8016697-Mini-Spacer)[](https://soundcloud.com/tuur-vekeman)

![Image 75](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

##### Goa Madness Records_BE_FR

### Moon Beasts

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Prepare for a sonic eargasm, because the minds behind Ephedra & Proxeeus will unleash their combined power at ZNA Festival! Moon Beasts is the perfect equilibrium of both projects: the darker touch of Proxeeus and the more uplifting melodies of Ephedra, mixed with a nice sauce of acid/TB sounds on top. Something nobody can resist!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/8717626-Moon-Beasts)[](https://soundcloud.com/moonbeasts)

![Image 76](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Nouveau-Shamanique_500x500.jpg)

##### Suntrip Records_BE

### Nouveau Shamanique

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Triquetra vs Dragon Twins’ new project is the definition of retro-futuristic Goa & acid-trance! Performing live sets with 100% hardware on stage in 2025, they create music like in the golden 90s! Both projects are well known for their high-energy acidic sound, but the fusion of their styles results in something different: rhythmically interesting, more experimental, and very psychedelic Goa-trance!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/5252321-Triquetra-3)[](https://soundcloud.com/triquetra-2)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/3531478-Dragon-Twins)[](https://soundcloud.com/djunasaurus)

![Image 77](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Proxeeus_500x500.jpg)

##### Global Sect / Goa Madness Records_FR

### Proxeeus

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Jerome is a French TB-303 / acid-trance artist who has been exploring darker territories lately as well. Because this combination is perfect for a night set at a Goa-trance festival, we will let him turn your brain inside-out for a crazy psychedelic experience!

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/3949225-Proxeeus)[](https://soundcloud.com/proxeeus)

![Image 78](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Skizologic-vs-Filteria_500x500.jpg)

##### Future Music Records_IL SE

### Skizologic vs Filteria

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

Another unique back-to-back set for ZNA! The master of modern melodic uplifting Goa-trance teams up with Skizologic, who is well known in the psytrance scene for his groovy, acidic style. When they create music together, it combines the best of both worlds. Some tracks have been released already; the rest you will discover here while stomping your feet!

![Image 79](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Ultravibe_500x500.jpg)

##### Future Music Records_SE UK

### Ultravibe

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/#)

One of the biggest legends of today’s Goa-trance is Filteria; one of the biggest legends of 90s Goa-trance is Cosmosis. When they make music together, the result can only be fantastic! Expect Goa-trance with a modern edge while stomping the dust!

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)

## ZaMbU TeMplE TimeTaBle

![Image 80](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/ZNA-LINEUP-WEB-1080x1080-01-3.png)

    *   [Art & Installations](https://znagathering.com/program/art-installations/)

We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits. By clicking “Accept”, you consent to the use of ALL the cookies.

[Read More](https://znagathering.com/privacy-cookie-policy/)[Cookie settings](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)[ACCEPT](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)

Privacy Policy

Close

#### Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities...

[](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)

[Necessary](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)

- [x] Necessary 

Always Enabled

 Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information. 

[Non-necessary](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)

- [x] Non-necessary 

 Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website. 

[SAVE & ACCEPT](https://znagathering.com/program/dancefloor/)
